response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Standard reference lyrics were incorrect, so manually transcribed song. 2. Timing & Pacing: Corrected misformatted minute timestamps in song start segments to align chronologically.

subtitles.original: きちゃん大丈夫とパート2、きちゃんありがとう！
subtitles.english: Ki-chan, Daijoubu and Part 2, Ki-chan, thank you!

subtitles.original: えー、今日の配信のハッシュタグは、ハッシュタグ「#おはししの生誕祭2026」です！
subtitles.english: Um, the hashtag for today's stream is #OhashishiNoSeitansai2026!

subtitles.original: SNSでたくさんポストしてください！
subtitles.english: Please post a lot on SNS!

subtitles.original: えー、開演中は、カメラやスマートフォンなどによる写真撮影、大歓迎です！
subtitles.english: Also, during the show, taking photos with cameras or smartphones is highly welcome!

subtitles.original: たくさんポストして、盛り上げていただけると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'd be happy if you post a lot to liven things up!

subtitles.original: それでは、開演まで、今しばらくお待ちください！
subtitles.english: Well then, please wait a little longer until the show starts!

subtitles.original: BANZAI 無の有（なえ）の地に
subtitles.english: BANZAI, in the land of nothingness/existence,

subtitles.original: 下らないお紛い物だってばラリアット
subtitles.english: even worthless phonies get lariated!

subtitles.original: [BANZAI / 作詞・作曲：マサ / 編曲：田中タロウ]
subtitles.english: [BANZAI / Lyrics & Composition: Masa / Arrangement: Tanaka Taro]

subtitles.original: 喝采 消したる夜の門
subtitles.english: Applause at the gates of the extinguished night,

subtitles.original: 鬱陶しい尾鰭を剥きながら僕は這う
subtitles.english: stripping away annoying rumors as I crawl.

subtitles.original: 才能はとうにどうにかしちまってるけど
subtitles.english: My talent has long been messed up,

subtitles.original: 歓声は脳にだっての
subtitles.english: but the cheers are ringing in my brain.

subtitles.original: 愛にまみれた言葉で心拍数
subtitles.english: My heart rate goes up with words covered in love,

subtitles.original: 生きてくたび胸は沈んでいく
subtitles.english: each time I live, my chest sinks deeper.

subtitles.original: どうなってんだろなプロローグ 揺れるの
subtitles.english: What's going on with this prologue? It's wavering.

subtitles.original: 悔い積んでもしょうがねえ
subtitles.english: There's no point in piling up regrets.

subtitles.original: 明日暮らせぐお金はどんだけ？
subtitles.english: How much money do we have to live on tomorrow?

subtitles.original: ああだこうだそんなもんか
subtitles.english: Blah blah, is that all it is?

subtitles.original: うるせえわな
subtitles.english: Shut the hell up.

subtitles.original: BANZAI 無の有の地に
subtitles.english: BANZAI, in the land of nothingness/existence,

subtitles.original: 空回っていく脳を満たしてくれ
subtitles.english: fill my spinning brain.

subtitles.original: 未来予想図なんか関係ない
subtitles.english: A map of the future doesn't matter,

subtitles.original: 下らないお紛い物だってそれ
subtitles.english: even if it's just a worthless counterfeit.

subtitles.original: 半端者なら洒落らんない成りじゃん
subtitles.english: If you're half-baked, you can't laugh it off, can you?

subtitles.original: お帰りの時間になって僕は思い通り
subtitles.english: When it's time to go home, I get my way.

subtitles.original: 体感計で竦む また罵詈雑言インベイダー
subtitles.english: Cowering on the sensory meter, the insult invader strikes again.

subtitles.original: 足が止まってる終芸 晒しにそうでも切りでするか
subtitles.english: My feet are stopped at the final act; should I cut it even if it's exposed?

subtitles.original: のらりくらり躱すわ
subtitles.english: I'll dodge it lazily.

subtitles.original: はじめまして神様
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you, God.

subtitles.original: もし救われるのなら 剥ぎ取るわ今から
subtitles.english: If I'm to be saved, I'll strip it off right now.

subtitles.original: Get down Get down 揺らめいて Get down Get down
subtitles.english: Get down, get down, swaying... Get down, get down.

subtitles.original: 乗り込んだTwitter空間が 君を狂わしてんだ
subtitles.english: The Twitter space you boarded is driving you mad.

subtitles.original: 雨降ったなら戻んの？ 泥ぬかるんで 行きと最後もアチュレイト
subtitles.english: Will you go back if it rains? It's muddy, both the start and end are saturated.

subtitles.original: どんな感度 そんなもんさ 虚しいわな
subtitles.english: What kind of sensitivity? That's just how it is, how empty.
